auth.label: API Key
auth.description: The Swarm API key sent with the x-api-key header. Generate it from the Team Settings API page.

actions.name: fetch_companies
actions.description: Fetch The Swarm company records by company IDs or LinkedIn company identifiers.

ids.description: The Swarm company IDs to fetch.

linkedinIds.description: LinkedIn numeric identifiers accepted by The Swarm.

items.description: The company sections to include in fetch results.

fields.description: Company sections to include in the response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching The Swarm companies. At least one company identifier array is required.

items.description: The raw record returned by The Swarm.

companies.description: The company records returned by The Swarm.

notFound.description: The company identifiers The Swarm did not find.

raw.description: The raw fetch companies response returned by The Swarm.

outputSchema.description: The normalized The Swarm fetch companies response.

actions.name: fetch_profiles
actions.description: Fetch The Swarm profile records by profile IDs or LinkedIn identifiers.

ids.description: The Swarm profile IDs to fetch.

linkedinNames.description: LinkedIn profile URL slugs to fetch.

linkedinIds.description: LinkedIn numeric identifiers accepted by The Swarm.

linkedinEntityIds.description: LinkedIn alphanumeric entity IDs to fetch.

items.description: The profile sections to include in fetch results.

fields.description: Profile sections to include in the response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching The Swarm profiles. At least one profile identifier array is required.

items.description: The raw record returned by The Swarm.

profiles.description: The profile records returned by The Swarm.

notFound.description: The profile identifiers The Swarm did not find.

raw.description: The raw fetch profiles response returned by The Swarm.

outputSchema.description: The normalized The Swarm fetch profiles response.

actions.name: get_credit_usage
actions.description: Get the current The Swarm API credit usage for the authenticated team.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for getting The Swarm credit usage.

usage.description: The number of credits consumed in the current billing period.

raw.description: The raw credit usage response returned by The Swarm.

outputSchema.description: The normalized The Swarm credit usage response.

actions.name: search_companies
actions.description: Search The Swarm companies with an Elasticsearch Query DSL query and return company IDs.

query.description: The Elasticsearch Query DSL query object sent to The Swarm.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return. Use exactly 1000 when stablePagination is true.

paginationToken.description: The pagination token returned by a previous The Swarm search response.

stablePagination.description: Whether The Swarm should keep pagination stable while retrieving large result sets.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching The Swarm companies. When stablePagination is true, limit must be 1000.

totalCount.description: The total number of records matching the query.

anyOf.description: The pagination token for the next request when more results are available.

raw.description: The raw search response returned by The Swarm.

outputSchema.description: The normalized The Swarm search response.

actions.name: search_profiles
actions.description: Search The Swarm profiles with an Elasticsearch Query DSL query and return profile IDs.

query.description: The Elasticsearch Query DSL query object sent to The Swarm.

limit.description: The maximum number of results to return. Use exactly 1000 when stablePagination is true.

paginationToken.description: The pagination token returned by a previous The Swarm search response.

stablePagination.description: Whether The Swarm should keep pagination stable while retrieving large result sets.

inNetworkOnly.description: Whether to restrict results to profiles connected to your team's network.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for searching The Swarm profiles. When stablePagination is true, limit must be 1000.

totalCount.description: The total number of records matching the query.

anyOf.description: The pagination token for the next request when more results are available.

raw.description: The raw search response returned by The Swarm.

outputSchema.description: The normalized The Swarm search response.
